title: 'They Didn’t Have Guts To Fire Back': Ops Sindoor Hero Recalls Fierce Combat With Pakistan As Nation Mourns One Year Since Pahalgam Attack
description: Marking one year since the Pahalgam terror attack that killed 26, Major Aimson Inpiu recounted Operation Sindoor’s intense LoC combat, saying Indian fire forced Pakistani troops to hide, as soldiers sought revenge.
